name: Super Heroes Finger
description: super heroes Fighter is the easiest and cheapest fighting game! Challenge your friends and family in the funniest thumbs up war matches! Enjoy the best 2-player matches, tournaments and wacky mini-games! A local against dementia! The original thumbs up game. - 2 player versus mode - Player versus phone - Computer versus computer mode (why not?) - Over 150 crazy XD characters - New products every week! - Lightweight and offline! - New features coming soon! Have fun with its cartoon character style and hilarious fighting. This lightweight game can be played offline and is great to play with friends. Hope you like it! 超级英雄战斗机
tags: Action, Adventure, Fight, Fighting, King, Superhero
